item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n08","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stays asleep/direct: it accepts the user's request to stop page-level patches and proposes an upstream unified after-sales rules entry, including IA, rule structure, backend configuration, migration, and rollout.
